description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with a mix of brick and dark panel facades. The structure is three stories tall, with large, regularly spaced windows on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. Two spacious balconies with outdoor seating, greenery, and a hot tub are visible, enhancing the building's residential appeal. The main entrance is a large glass door set within the dark-paneled section, while the rest of the building is clad in reddish-brown brick. The rooftop and balconies are adorned with plants, and the outdoor spaces are furnished for relaxation and social gatherings. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and designed for urban living.
description: A three-story modern apartment building with brick and dark panel exteriors, large windows, and multiple balconies featuring outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, two balconies with outdoor furniture and plants, and the contrasting brick and dark panel facades.
description_view_1: This side shows a uniform brick facade with regularly spaced windows and a single blue-tinted window, with minimal balcony visibility.
description_view_2: This view displays the rear of the building, featuring a continuous brick facade, large windows, and a single balcony with a hot tub and plants.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the balconies, outdoor seating, and greenery, as well as the large glass doors and windows opening onto the terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent vertical and horizontal spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance on all facades.
